race.comment: ZOUTRAIL (5) has been denied narrowly in her last two but is at her top now on the quick back-up and is ready to put it all together. The key switch in Toeroek for this stable signals intent. MISS SGHIRRIPA (4) returns for the Oxlades and has jumped out sharply in readiness. Has enough pace to overcome a sticky draw and should give backers a bold sight. ROYAL TRAPEZE (1) doesn't win out of turn but boasts peaks that measure up. Only beaten a long neck last time and is a live hope if he can hold that form. AVANZO (10) only warmed into it late when resuming at Clare, making inroads to finish third. Better for that hitout and is worth safekeeping in the placings.
